name: graphify
install_doc: README: `uv tool install graphifyy` then `graphify install --platform claude` to drop the skill into the agent config. THOL installs the pinned PyPI build and the Claude Code skill at setup; the agent builds/queries the per-repo graph via `graphify` itself.
notes: Code-knowledge-graph retrieval. A skill teaches the agent to build `graphify-out/graph.json` (no-LLM extraction) and run `graphify query "..."` / `graphify path` / `graphify explain` instead of reading whole files. THOL installs the skill; graph build + queries happen in-session via the `graphify` CLI.
